steps.title: Identify the specific data point required
steps.content: The question asks for the average price of lemons in July 2021. This specifies exactly which row and column of the table we need to locate.

steps.title: Read the table and eliminate alternatives
steps.content: The table shows \$31.78 at the intersection of Lemons and July 2021. The other choices represent either prices for different fruits in July 2021 (grapefruits at \$22.98, oranges at \$13.79) or the price of lemons from a different time period (June 2021 at \$28.94). That matches choice A — A is correct.
